evaluation_method: Multiple-choice question answering with 2,981 questions across 37 subjects spanning social science, STEM, humanities, and Taiwan-specific content. Two evaluation approaches: (1) Likelihood-based method examining candidate answer symbols (A, B, C, D) and selecting the one with highest token probability, used for open-source models; (2) Generation-based method using the first greedily generated token interpretable as an option code, used when probability access is unavailable. Accuracy is the primary metric.
